# Pixels Studio

> Pixels Studio is the independent practice of Abhishek Kambli — a designer and frontend developer building products for AI and SaaS companies, with over a decade of shipping from zero to scale. Work spans product design, design systems, and frontend engineering.

## Services

- [2-week design sprint](https://pixels.studio/#services): One focused build — a landing page, dashboard, brand starter, or up to 8 mobile screens. $2,500 one-time.
- [Ongoing retainer](https://pixels.studio/#services): Dedicated design partnership with unlimited requests, 48-hour turnarounds, and weekly strategy calls. $5,000/month.

## Selected projects

- [Prism](https://prism.pixels.studio): Photo effects, right in the browser.
- [Rhythm](https://rhythm.pixels.studio): Abstract patterns for design and web.
- [Origon](https://origon.ai): An enterprise platform for AI agents.
- [Hub](https://pixels.studio/#projects): Customer management platform for SaaS teams.
